mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase corporate borrowing costs and compress equity valuation multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A unemployment rate crossing above 4.5 percent signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending expectations and trigger negative S&P 500 forward returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal produces positive returns in >60% of triggered instances or t-statistic for return differential is < 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal income and housing starts indicate a synchronized contraction in consumer demand and construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Joint decline periods yield positive 60-day returns in >50% of cases or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: An accelerating index of industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during expansionary phases.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >65% of acceleration episodes or rolling IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid monthly inflation increases force monetary authorities to maintain restrictive policy stances, which compresses equity valuations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >55% of high-inflation months or signal loses predictive power when inflation is below threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate wage income and supports corporate revenue projections, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03 or 60-day returns are negative in >60% of high-growth payroll months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and real personal income confirms robust household purchasing power and economic growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect yields negative returns in >50% of joint expansion quarters or coefficient significance drops below 90% confidence.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a manufacturing slowdown that reduces near-term earnings expectations and triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of double-decline episodes or signal fails to beat random walk benchmark.
